name: Solar Array
description: One-time +20 power buffer; ongoing +10 power per level each day.

name: Hydroponics
description: +22 food on build; ongoing +6 food per level each day.

name: Habitat
description: +3 population cap and +4 morale on build; +1 morale per level each day.

name: Workshop
description: +10 morale and +10 credits on build; +1 morale per level each day from crew culture.

name: Radio Tower
description: Trade contacts on build; +2 credits and +1 morale per level each day.
